description: Invoice with early payment discount terms of 2/10 Net 30 showing discount amount if paid within 10 days

INVOICE

Invoice Date: 2025-09-15   Due Date: 2025-10-15
Vendor: Brightwater Chemical Distributors Inc.
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX1177
Vendor Address: 1900 Chemical Park Drive, Baton Rouge, LA 70801
Bill To: Gulf Coast Processing Solutions LLC
   AP Department, 4400 Refinery Row, Pasadena, TX 77507

Payment Terms: 2/10 Net 30   Currency: USD

6. Hazmat Handling Fee (DOT 49 CFR compliance)                  $350.00

If paid after 2025-09-25:

ACH/Wire: First Horizon Bank | Routing: 084000026 | Acct: XXXX-XXXX-3390
AR Contact: ar@brightwaterchem.com | 225-555-0154
